Event: The Moon Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: BK18
Wolf's Tales Book

Once in a while, the unit draws the life force from 3 random enemies for 6 sec. While low on life force, enemies deal 25% less damage and take 25% more damage. Stacks up to 3 times. If an enemy low on life force dies, they can't be resurrected for 6 sec, and the book wearer's spell power increases by 15% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 10 times.
For the duration of the battle, enemies low on life force take 174400 (+9214 of the spell power) magic damage every second.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Event: The Moon Treasure Hunt
